codeReview.summary: Implementation delivers all required artifacts for the Foundations extraction: token JSON/CSS files, Tailwind reference HTML, PNG screenshot, and README content. File presence/content and structural expectations are met; one minor naming inconsistency was found in status token keys.

issues.description: Status token keys use `default` and `success` rather than the requirement wording `offline` and `connected` (see validation-contract VAL-TOK-001). Semantics are preserved via descriptions, but explicit key naming would improve consistency for downstream consumers.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Extractor skill screenshot instructions appear out of sync with actual tool behavior in this environment. The skill says `Paper___get_screenshot` returns base64 ready for direct decode, but the worker transcript shows empty tool payload handling and required fallback via direct MCP HTTP call.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/extractor/SKILL.md (Step 3c) vs mission transcript skeleton for session 8e62c30a-19fe-43e9-92df-258dec0b1e96 (multiple failed screenshot-save attempts and curl probing), plus handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges requesting MCP HTTP save guidance.

summary: Reviewed feature design-tokens-foundations at commit 3152ce9. The feature meets expected deliverables and is acceptable to pass, with one non-blocking token-naming consistency issue and one skill-documentation gap around screenshot persistence.
